title: allium polyanthum
intro: Allium polyanthum, also known as Chinese chives or garlic chives, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the Allium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties that can help to combat colds, fever, and other respiratory infections. The health benefits of Allium polyanthum include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared as a tea or used in cooking, and its herbal preparations also include making it into a tincture or applying its extract topically to relieve skin irritations and wounds.
